subject: Quick question on transition workflows
email_text:
Hi Heidrick,

I have been following your work at Heidrick and Struggles, and I thought this might be useful for SEARCH transitions.

Starting Monday gives senior leaders a practical execution system: target company intelligence, role-specific prep briefs, and outreach workflows that improve signal quality in first-touch conversations.

For SEARCH leaders at Heidrick and Struggles, the real risk is sounding credible in theory but not specific enough to move the conversation forward.

In recent executive transitions, progression improved when role-specific narratives were tested and revised before high-stakes conversations.

The clearest proof point for SEARCH leaders is cleaner role-specific positioning supported by measurable execution evidence.

If this is not relevant right now, no worries.

For SEARCH candidates, the biggest win is cleaner role-specific positioning supported by measurable execution evidence.

If useful, I can send a one-page sample built around your SEARCH context.
